philippines.title: DILG, PNP KOICA agree on upgraded system to manage PH crime data
philippines.description:
MANILA, Philippines — The Department of the Interior and Local Government (DILG), the Philippine National Police (PNP), and the Korean International Cooperation Agency (KOICA) have agreed to implement an upgraded system for managing data on crimes in the Philippines. The upgraded system is called the Criminal Investigation Data Management and Analysis System (CIDMAS). The DILG said the record of discussions was signed on Thursday by Interior Secretary Jonvic Remulla, PNP chief Gen. Jose Melencio Nartatez Jr., KOICA officials Jung Youngsun and Lee Hwayeon, and PNP Investigation and Detective Management Director Brig. Gen. Matthew Baccay. READ: PH, South Korea to modernize […]...
Keep on reading: DILG, PNP KOICA agree on upgraded system to manage PH crime data

philippines.title: Paknaan residents fear displacement from 4th Cebu-Mactan Bridge project
philippines.description:
MANDAUE CITY, Cebu — Residents of Barangay Paknaan in Mandaue City have expressed concern over the planned construction of the fourth Cebu-Mactan Bridge, which is expected to affect around 204 houses once the project officially begins. Glenda Limbatao, 32, a resident of Zone Ahos in Barangay Paknaan, said her family were among the fire victims previously relocated to the former Cebu International Convention Center (CICC) before they were transferred to Paknaan due to the construction of the Mandaue City Government Center. She said they only transferred to the area in August 2024 and are now facing another possible relocation due […]...
Keep on reading: Paknaan residents fear displacement from 4th Cebu-Mactan Bridge project

philippines.title: BIZ BUZZ: Fragile Lopez peace holds
philippines.description:
As the Lopez family feud spilled into public gossip earlier this year, First Gen Corp., led by Federico “Piki” Lopez, took a guarded stance as it limited media access to its annual stockholders’ meeting on Thursday to a virtual feed. But this may have worked, as Piki and other key officials appeared calmer, belying the bickering and aggressive exchanges seen in previous months After the usual reports—flaunting milestones and hefty capital for growth—came the eagerly anticipated question-and-answer portion. Although the setup was initially expected to limit uncomfortable inquiries or media grilling over the controversial family issues, First Gen started it […]...
Keep on reading: BIZ BUZZ: Fragile Lopez peace holds

philippines.title: From ‘king’ to ‘steward’: How Piki Lopez answered the Lopez family rift question
philippines.description: In a meeting where the family war surfaced only in three sentences, Beaver Lopez’s brief cameo landed like the rift in miniature: present, unresolved, and choosing, on Thursday afternoon at least, not to speak.

world.description: Bangladesh is scrambling to vaccinate more children amid a measles outbreak that has killed more than 500 people, most of them children.

energy.title: Malaysia Boosts Domestic Gas Use as Power Demand Hits Record Highs
energy.description: A major heatwave and soaring data center electricity consumption are driving Malaysia’s power demand to record highs, pushing the world’s fifth-largest LNG exporter to increase domestic gas use for power generation. Malaysia’s state energy firm Petronas has increased LNG supply from domestic offshore fields to peninsular Malaysia, where 80% of national power demand is concentrated, according to data and analysis by Reuters. Power demand in peninsular Malaysia jumped by 11.5% in April from a year earlier, per data from Grid System…

energy.title: TotalEnergies Plans $5.2 Billion Offshore Wind Project in Normandy
energy.description: TotalEnergies has applied for authorization of France's biggest renewables project, a 1.5-GW offshore wind project off Normandy, which is estimated to cost $5.2 billion, the French supermajor said on Thursday. Eight months after the French government awarded the project to TotalEnergies, the group's wholly-owned project company Centre Manche Energies has officially applied for the Single Authorization of the 1.5 GW offshore wind farm, which will be located about 40 km (25 miles) off the coast of Normandy. The application includes technical and…

usStocks.title: DG Matrix Reveals Interport SST for the NVIDIA MGX Ecosystem, Delivering 800 VDC Power for AI Factories
usStocks.description: SAN FRANCISCO, May 28, 2026--DG Matrix, the global leader in solid-state transformer solutions, today introduced the Interport™ solid-state transformer (SST) platform, designed to integrate seamlessly with the NVIDIA MGX modular rack architecture. The Interport SST delivers native 800 VDC power to GPU-dense racks, positioning DG Matrix at the center of the industry’s accelerating shift to 800 VDC power distribution for next-generation AI deployments.
usStocks.source: Yahoo! Finance: AAPL MSFT GOOGL AMZA NVDA News

entertainment.title: Gersh Forms Soccer Division After Buying Trent Alexander-Arnold’s Rep PLG
entertainment.description: Gersh has launched a soccer agency after buying UK outfit PLG, merging it with You First Football, which it bought in 2024. The new agency, called Gersh Football, will rep the likes of Trent Alexander-Arnold, Jarrod Bowen, Fabián Ruiz, Alexia Putellas and Christoph Baumgartner. Financial details were not disclosed. entertainment.description: Without a set definition "advertisers are deciding whose budget this is to come out of, there's oftentimes a tug of war, or it gets orphaned," said Oxford Road CEO Dan Granger.

entertainment.title: ‘Moriarty’: Fremantle, Archery Pictures Team on Crime Drama Inspired by Sherlock Holmes Nemesis
entertainment.description: Written by Chris Cornwell (‘A Discovery of Witches’) and Oliver Lansley (‘Where’s Wanda?’), the “modern reinvention of the crime procedural” casts the protagonist as a criminal psychology professor who leads a double life and becomes a police consultant.
